name: stainedmotion
description: Generative stained-glass (and future Art Nouveau) animated wallpapers for Wallpaper Engine and the web.

scripts.test: node build.mjs && node test/motion.test.mjs && node test/smoke.test.mjs stained-glass && node test/smoke.test.mjs art-nouveau && node test/smoke.test.mjs art-nouveau-v1
